creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
Trying to build xcache when lang/php52 is installed results in:

===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Found saved configuration for xcache-2.0.0
===>  Extracting for xcache-2.0.0_1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for xcache-2.0.0.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for xcache-2.0.0_1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for xcache-2.0.0_1
===>   xcache-2.0.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/phpize - found
===>   xcache-2.0.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/autoconf-2.69 - found
===>  PHPizing for xcache-2.0.0_1
Configuring for:
PHP Api Version:         20041225
Zend Module Api No:      20060613
Zend Extension Api No:   220060519
Cannot find autoconf. Please check your autoconf installation and the
$PHP_AUTOCONF environment variable. Then, rerun this script.

I think this one goes for lang/php52 maintainers.
